I can totally believe that this is the case since GW hates first born. If it is the case I feel extremely mislead and manipulated. This is nostalgia baiting and key jangling at its worst if true. We want a true spiritual successor to astartes 1 and that simply can’t be achieved in primaris armour. They’re frankly far too safe and halo looking to fit into the grim dark aesthetic that the artist had in the first one.

“I have no needs I apologize”
"""And for a lot of people thats enough."" Humility and modesty is just as much a sign of humanity as Pride and Excellence. Its takes great people to build a society and average people to run it. Both would be in ruin without the other. Praise be to anyone who can see the significance in both."

I can do it well however I still try to do the picture perfect follow through and it gets me fucked up half the time. But for sure with chipping/Irons its that hip high forward and back pinch that does real good. I go shoulder high with the Driver but its a similar motion slow back then accelerate and concentrate on the pinch. The follow through happens automatically if your doing it right"

He’s not wrong movies the last 10years are mostly bs. Comedy is nearly everyone’s favorite genre… when not half cooked. Who doesn’t like to laugh?! Movies today just don’t give you much to love. With the exception of a few.. but the stars fizzle as soon as their “real” personality is visible. Most people who pursue fame are obsessed with themselves… is it a necessary evil? I don’t think so… it’s a choice. For example Jennifer Lopez- pays a real singer to be the actual talent for her “hit” album. (Milli Vanilli- without the blow back in her case). No one likes to be tricked. It’s like calling you stupid without the balls or decency to say it plainly to your face.

He’s not wrong movies the last 10years are mostly bs. Comedy is nearly everyone’s favorite genre… when not half cooked. Who doesn’t like to laugh?! Movies today just don’t give you much to love. With the exception of a few.. but the stars fizzle as soon as their “real” personality is visible. Most people who pursue fame are obsessed with themselves… is it a necessary evil?
